zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Gilbert於大約1456年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton39歲，母親Elizabeth Hill33歲。她於大約1469年與Sir Thomas Grenville II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1494年2月2日在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓享年39歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Gilbert于大约1456年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton39岁，母亲Elizabeth Hill33岁。她于大约1469年与Sir Thomas Grenville II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1494年2月2日在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓享年39岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin), French, and German: from the personal name Giselbert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble youth’ (see Giesel ) + berht ‘bright, famous’. This personal name enjoyed considerable popularity in England during the Middle Ages, partly as a result of the fame of Saint Gilbert of Sempringham (1085–1189), the founder of the only native English monastic order.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: The Devon family of Gilbert can be traced to Geoffrey Gilbert (died 1349), who represented Totnes in Parliament in 1326. His descendants included Sir Humphrey Gilbert (died 1583), who discovered Newfoundland. — Étienne Gilbert from Aulnay in Vienne, France, married Marguerite Thibault in Neuville, QC, in 1683. Louis Gilbert dit Comtois from Besançon in Doubs married Anne Jacques in Charlesbourg, QC, in 1722. Pierre Gilbert from Barbezieux-Saint-Hilaire in Charente, France, married Marie-Angélique Dufour in Petite-Rivière-Saint-François, QC, in 1756. Charles Dupuis dit Gilbert from Rosnay in Indre, France, married Marie-Jeanne Brunet in Sainte-Foy, QC, in 1741.

variants.name: Gieseke
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ). Compare Giesecke .

variants.name: Giliberto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Constantino, Costantino, Emilio, Rosario, Santo, Sebastiano, Vittorio.
Italian: from an ancient Germanic personal name (see   Gilbert  ).

variants.name: Gipp
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the personal name Gipp, a pet form of Gilbert . See also Gibbs . Alternatively, if pronounced with a soft g, it is a variant of Jepp, from the Middle English personal name Jep(p), Gep(pe), a pet form of Jeffrey .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the stem geb ‘gift’, as in Gebhard (see Gebhardt ).

variants.name: Gilbertson
meanings: English (northern): from the personal name Gilbert + -son.

variants.name: Giesel
meanings: German: from the personal name Giesel, a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names with the first element gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble offspring’. In ancient and medieval ancient Germanic society, the younger children of kings and princes were sometimes sent to be brought up at the court of a neighboring ruler, as a pledge of peace between the two nations or clans. Thus, the male personal name Gisil and its feminine equivalent Gisela mean both ‘pledge’ and ‘noble offspring’.

variants.name: Gilb
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name   Gilbert  .

variants.name: Gibert
meanings: French and German: from a shortened form of the personal name   Gilbert  . This name was also brought to England by Huguenot refugees in the 17th century.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Giese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Klaus, Erwin, Heiner, Heinz, Uwe, Aloysius, Armin, Dieter, Erhard, Ewald, Frieda.

German, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of the personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ), or any other ancient Germanic name with gīsil ‘hostage, pledge, noble offspring’ (see Giesel ) as the first element. Compare Giesey .

variants.name: Gibby
meanings: English (Pembrokeshire): from a Middle English pet form of the personal name   Gilbert  .

variants.name: Gebbie
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): from a pet form of the Norman personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Gilbert was born about 1456, in Devon, England, her father, Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Hill, was 33. She married Sir Thomas Grenville II about 1469. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 2 February 1494, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Gilbert est née environ 1456, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hill, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Grenville II environ 1469. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1494, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1469 Sir Thomas Grenville II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1494 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England und wurde in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Gilbertが約1456年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Otho Gilbert Lord of Comptonは39歳，母Elizabeth Hillは33歳であった。約1469年にSir Thomas Grenville IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年2月2日にイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンで39歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Gilbert(이)가 대략 1456년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hill(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1469년 Sir Thomas Grenville II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 2월 2일 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Grenville II aproximadamente 1469. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Gilbert родилась около 1456 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hill, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Grenville II около 1469 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 2 февраля 1494 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия.
